# Finances Overview

## Accounts
- **Girokonto**: Sparkasse München
- **Tagesgeld**: ING — emergency fund (~6 months expenses)
- **Depot**: Trade Republic — ETF savings plan

## Monthly Budget (rough)
- Miete: 1450€
- Nebenkosten: 250€
- Lebensmittel: 600€
- Kinder (Schule, Hobbies): 300€
- Auto: 350€ (Leasing + Versicherung + Sprit)
- Freizeit: 400€
- Sparen: 500€

## Recurring Payments
- Spotify Family: 14.99€
- Netflix: 12.99€
- Gym (FitnessFirst): 49€
- ADAC: yearly, ~100€
- Haftpflicht + Hausrat: yearly, ~250€

## Goals
- Emergency fund: ✓ done
- Vacation fund: build up 2000€ by June
- ETF: continue monthly 500€ into MSCI World
- Kids education fund: 100€/month each into separate accounts

## Tax
- Steuerberater: Kanzlei Huber, do taxes in March
- Keep receipts for: home office, work equipment, Fortbildung
